tips_en: I recommend starting with MolmoAct2, as its tangible robotics deployment provides the clearest motivation and architecture for multimodal reasoning. It naturally connects to CoPD, which tackles the harder training-level problem of consolidating diverse multimodal experts into one model, while ESamp offers a complementary inference-time decoding strategy that could boost reasoning diversity in either system.
tips_zh: 建议首先阅读 MolmoAct2，其真实的机器人部署场景为多模态推理提供了最直观的切入点。该工作与 CoPD 形成上下呼应：CoPD 从训练范式层面解决了如何将多样的多模态专家能力蒸馏整合到单一模型中，而 ESamp 则提供了推理阶段的互补方法，可进一步增强上述系统的语义探索与推理多样性。
